text:
Your Threads account doesn’t need you to post every day. It needs a feedback loop that turns yesterday’s data into today’s better content.

I set that up with free tools and the official Meta API. One-time 2-hour setup. Now it reads its own analytics, rewrites itself, and never asks me for ideas. Tokens auto-refresh. Zero maintenance.

Consistency without the grind. That’s the real system.

Grab the blueprint (link in bio)
